ext_weather.name: Overnight
ext_weather.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before 1am, then smoke and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
